criteriaResults.evidence: whisperdeep/generator.py exists; `python -c "import whisperdeep.generator"` succeeds. Module exports DungeonGenerator class and generate() convenience function.
generate(80, 40, 12345) returns Floor with width=80 height=40; .get(x,y) yields a Tile at all in-bounds coords (verified at (0,0)='#'). 14 rooms placed.
generate(60,30,42) called twice; all 1800 tile glyphs match across both runs (100% match).
MD5 of tile-grid for seeds [1,2,3,4,5] yielded 5/5 unique hashes (>=4/5 threshold).
Seed=7, 80x40 -> 14 rooms placed; pairwise interior overlap count=0 (>=4 rooms, zero overlap).
BFS over walkable tiles from arbitrary start: reachable=1040 of total walkable=1040 (100%).

Avg doors per floor across 5 seeds = 29.0 (>=1 threshold). Generator's _place_doors at generator.py:172-226 enforces door must have room-interior neighbor on one axis and walls on the orthogonal axis (classic doorway pattern).
World(master_seed=999, num_floors=3): floor0 (up=0, down=1), floor1 (up=1, down=1), floor2 (up=1, down=0). Matches contract rule exactly.
All '<' and '>' tiles found across 3 floors are reachable via BFS from any walkable tile; tested with master_seed=42.
Game.from_seed(7) spawns player at room[0].center; tile glyph '.', walkable=True, in_room=True (verified by checking player coords against all room rectangles).
Game.from_seed(7); teleport to '>' on floor 0; descend() returns True; current_floor_index advances 0->1; player tile is '<' on new floor (game.py:91-110).
After descent in C11, teleport to '<' on floor 1; ascend() returns True; current_floor_index decrements 1->0; player tile is '>' on returned floor (game.py:112-130).
MD5 signature of floor 0 captured before descent; after descent->ascent round-trip, signature matches identically (100% tiles preserved). World caches floors in self._floors dict (world.py:48-72).

World(master_seed=999, num_floors=3) produces 3 distinct non-empty floors; floor0 sig=6c9e51e7..., floor1 sig=0c01f79c..., distinct. derive_floor_seed at world.py:17-30 mixes master+index deterministically.

Render frame contains '#', '.', '+', '>', '@' glyphs at runtime; '<' is generated on floors 1+ (verified across 3-floor World: full glyph set {<,>,#,+,.} present). Player '@' overlay placed by render_frame on top of tile glyphs.
`python -m whisperdeep --seed 1 --headless` outputs an 80x40 frame containing '#' walls, '.' floor (visible room shapes), '+' doors, '>' downstairs, and '@' player (visible at column 22, row ~36).
try_move(dx,dy) at game.py:70-89 checks floor.walkable; wall bump returns False, player position unchanged. Verified: bumped wall, position before==after.
Door at (6,34) tested; player teleported adjacent and moved into door; player tile after = '+'; move returned True. Doors are tile.walkable=True per tiles.py.
Two runs with `--seed 7 --headless` produce byte-identical stdout (MD5 identical); `--seed 8 --headless` differs from `--seed 7`. Argparse wires --seed -> Game.from_seed(seed=...) in cli.py.
tests/test_generator.py contains 11 tests targeting the generator; tests/test_game.py contains 10 game/movement tests. pytest run: 44 passed in 0.37s, 0 failures. Generator-specific tests >>5.

Regression: `python -m whisperdeep --seed 1` launches without errors; renders a frame with '@' visible; tests/test_sprint01.py (23 tests covering Sprint 1 C1-C21) all pass under current code. Sprint 1 entity/tile/grid model and movement preserved.

docs/whisperdeep.md documents: glyph legend (table at lines 31-43), generator tunable parameters (table at lines 76-83), and `--seed` CLI flag (table at lines 109-120). All three required topics covered.

regressionResults.registrySource: harness-state/regression/registry.json (empty - sprint 1 self-eval did not register criteria) and tests/test_sprint01.py (23 explicit Sprint 1 contract tests)
regressionResults.evidence: All 23 Sprint 1 contract tests in tests/test_sprint01.py pass under Sprint 2 code (test_c1 through test_c21). Game launches, renders, accepts movement command. No regression detected.

correctness.rationale: All 22 contract criteria pass with verifiable evidence. 44/44 pytest tests pass. Determinism, connectivity, stair invariants, multi-floor descent/ascent, floor persistence - all programmatically verified.

quality.rationale: Clean module separation (tiles, floor, generator, world, game, render, entity, cli). Type hints throughout. Dataclasses for params. Comprehensive docstrings. Door placement logic is principled (classical doorway pattern).

completeness.rationale: All deliverables present: generator module, World abstraction with >=3 floors, render loop, --seed CLI, 21 generator/game tests, comprehensive docs/whisperdeep.md. Headless mode for CI. All glyphs documented and rendered.

robustness.rationale: Out-of-bounds moves are no-ops (no exceptions). World guards single-room corner case in stair placement. World validates num_floors>=1. teleport() validates walkable. Possible weakness: generator could fail to place even one room with extreme parameters (no fallback observed), but defaults work robustly across all tested seeds.

notes: Sprint 2 bootstrapped the full project scaffold AND delivered F2 (per handoff notes) - Sprint 1 wasn't separately implemented but its functionality is fully present and regression-tested.
Branch under test: harness/game-sprint-02-sprint-02. Diff vs main: 15 files added (whisperdeep/* and tests/* and docs/whisperdeep.md), 1810 insertions.
Independent verification on fresh context: ran pytest (44/44 PASS), headless render (correct frame), per-criterion programmatic checks (all PASS), CLI seed flag determinism (PASS).
Regression registry was empty so sprint-1 regression was checked via tests/test_sprint01.py + live launch.
